name: Saurabh Tiwari

education.university: IIM Calcutta (Triple Crown Accredited: AACSB, EQUIS, AMBA)

education.institution: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) BHU, Varanasi

experience.title: Senior Product Manager
responsibilities: Owned product strategy and execution for Leegality's Document Intelligence product — grew ARR from ₹8 Crore to ₹21 Crore in 18 months.
Led 0-to-1 launch of AI-powered document classification feature using GPT-4 API — reduced document setup time by 65%; 90% client adoption within 45 days.
Built and managed a PLG onboarding flow reducing Time-to-Value (TTV) from 12 days to 48 hours for SME segment.
Managed OKRs for product squad of 11 (4 engineers, 2 designers, 1 data scientist, 1 QA, 3 CS).
Represented product in 12 enterprise sales cycles — closed ₹4.5 Crore in deals through product demos.
Defined pricing architecture for 3 product tiers; collaborated with CFO on unit economics modeling.

experience.title: Product Manager
responsibilities: Managed loyalty and campaign management modules serving 200+ retail brands across 30 countries.
Shipped 2 major platform re-architectures: microservices migration of loyalty engine (0% downtime) and new campaign builder.
Reduced churn from 18% to 9% by redesigning onboarding experience based on 80 customer interviews.
Owned integrations roadmap — built 15+ third-party integrations (Shopify, WooCommerce, Salesforce, Klaviyo).

projects.name: AI Document Intelligence – Leegality
projects.description: 0-to-1 AI feature using GPT-4 to auto-classify, extract, and validate legal documents. Reduced document setup from 45 min to 8 min. 90% client adoption in 45 days.
projects.impact: ₹2.8 Crore ARR attributable | 65% setup time reduction | NPS: 28 → 61

projects.name: PLG Onboarding Redesign
projects.description: Redesigned Leegality's SME onboarding with in-app walkthroughs, empty-state guidance, and milestone celebrations. TTV reduced from 12 days to 48 hours.
projects.impact: Month-1 retention improved from 42% to 71% | Activation rate: 38% → 67%

achievements: Leegality Top Performer 2023 — Only PM in company history to achieve 2x ARR in single year
Speaker: SaaStr India 2023 – 'AI Features Done Right: Lessons from B2B SaaS'
Forbes India '30 Under 35 in Tech' — Shortlisted (2023)
